prompt: Show me the diff of only the staged changes in the repository (not unstaged changes).
system: You are a coding assistant with access to the tools listed below. Use them to accomplish the user's request.

tools.name: git_diff
tools.description: Show changes between commits, working tree, etc.

staged.description: If true, show only staged (cached) changes

tools.name: git_status
tools.description: Show the working tree status of a git repository.

tools.name: git_log
tools.description: Show commit history for the repository.

max_count.description: Maximum number of commits to show

rubric: 1=no tool call or completely wrong tool, 2=used git_status instead of git_diff, 3=used git_diff but without the staged parameter set to true, 4=used git_diff with staged: true but minor issues with repo_path, 5=single git_diff call with staged: true and correct repo_path, no unnecessary extra calls
